notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry flies out to left fielder Ian Happ in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Guardians challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Chase DeLauter grounds into a double play, first baseman Michael Busch to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Steven Kwan out at 2nd. Chase DeLauter out at 1st.
